csv_import_row_outcome_status_payload_pa.name: csv_import_row_outcome_status_payload_pair
csv_import_row_outcome_status_payload_pa.value: ("csv_import_row_outcome"."status_code" in ('applied', 'idempotent') and "csv_import_row_outcome"."transaction_request_id" is not null and "csv_import_row_outcome"."lifecycle_event_id" is not null and "csv_import_row_outcome"."error_message" is null) or ("csv_import_row_outcome"."status_code" = 'failed' and "csv_import_row_outcome"."transaction_request_id" is null and "csv_import_row_outcome"."lifecycle_event_id" is null and "csv_import_row_outcome"."error_message" is not null and length("csv_import_row_outcome"."error_message") > 0)

onboarding_apply_job_attempt_error_pair.name: onboarding_apply_job_attempt_error_pair
onboarding_apply_job_attempt_error_pair.value: ("onboarding_apply_job_attempt"."status_code" = 'applied' and "onboarding_apply_job_attempt"."error_message" is null and "onboarding_apply_job_attempt"."retryable" = 0) or ("onboarding_apply_job_attempt"."status_code" != 'applied' and "onboarding_apply_job_attempt"."error_message" is not null and length("onboarding_apply_job_attempt"."error_message") > 0)

transaction_request_payload_pair.name: transaction_request_payload_pair
transaction_request_payload_pair.value: ("transaction_request"."payload_version" is null and "transaction_request"."payload_json" is null) or ("transaction_request"."payload_version" is not null and "transaction_request"."payload_json" is not null and length("transaction_request"."payload_json") > 0)
